comment.body: @ghajini 1. It seems to me that "**Advanced Settings → Block Java + Block Flash**" causes this problem, so if you only add "**@@||eslite.com^$stealth=flash**", the problem will still exist. 　 2. Add "**@@||eslite.com^$stealth=java**" to the allowed list.

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://10.com.au/race-across-the-world](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2F10.com.au%2Frace-across-the-world) ### Comment > When I enable the AdBlock on 10Play, I'm met with this ''Unexpected Error" which prevents the videos from playing. Also, when I turn off AdBlock I have no issue playing videos which leads me to believe that it isn't something external causing the issue. This problem is the same for all videos on the site. I've also ensured my VPN is turned off as that can sometimes cause issues. > > Hopefully it can be fixed and thankyou for the otherwise highly effective online tool! :) ### Screenshots

comment.body:
@TesterMan247 Thanks for your reply. However, we didn't make any changes.

> Could you guys with the same issue also try and see if you are getting the same results as me or not?

Sorry, we are unable to check this site at the moment because of an external IP access issue in Australia. 

We can only take the following action regarding this site: infer the rules from the logs you submitted and ask you to review them directly. 

I am closing this issue. Please feel free to leave a comment if the issue occurs again.

comment.body:
```adblock
primevideo.com#%#//scriptlet('json-prune', 'cuepointPlaylist vodPlaybackUrls.result.playbackUrls.cuepoints')
||primevideo.com/cdp/getVideoAds
```

The Mini filter registry contains two rules: https://filters.adtidy.org/extension/safari/filters/2_optimized.txt.

Not necessary to add `!+ NOT_OPTIMIZED` comment. I am closing this issue.

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://aternos.org/server/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Faternos.org%2Fserver%2F) ### Comment > 画像の編集ができず、一部しか写せませんでしたが、要するにサイト内のほぼあらゆる操作が止まっており、ページ切り替え以外はボタンを押しても反応しません(例：サーバー起動ボタンなど) ### Screenshots

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://vk.com/audio-2001689051_148689051](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fvk.com%2Faudio-2001689051_148689051) ### Comment > Выключается плеер вконтакте когда включен Adguard. Когда выключен - появляется. Музыка играет по меню сверху или при нажатии кнопки "слушать". Вероятно из за того что гении из команды ВК что то изменили в коде виджета плеера и там по умолчанию должна крутиться реклама. > > The VKontakte player turns off when Adguard is turned on. When it's turned off, it appears. Music plays from the menu above or when you press the "listen" button. Probably because the geniuses from the VK team changed something in the code of the player widget and advertising should run there by default. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://reports.adguard.info/stcdn/sitereports/q0a8icrhez48ckok4cs44cc8g8wo8s0ffrwa9as40o.jpg?nc=1)

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

Your attached HTML Screenshot
@DimitrisKalaboukas, Sorry, but the attached element is a login wall, not a mobile bottom drawer. We are not blocking the login wall. Because it is intended to remain visible and should not be hidden.
Could you share the element ID for the mobile bottom drawer?
> [!NOTE] > The issue is marked as “A: Waiting for data”. It will be closed in 5 days if there’s no new activity.

labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://cartaocontinente.pt/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcartaocontinente.pt%2F) ### Comment > Most parts of the website are not displayed correctly and can't login. > The following user rule fixes the issue: > > `@@cartaocontinente.pt^$stealth=flash` > > As it seems flash is required to run the website. > > ``` Username: @arturstat ``` ### Screenshots

issue.title: ottawasun.com

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body:
> It will be fixed.

`##+js(acs, document.getElementsByTagName, .pubads)` does not work well on Postmedia sites. It appears to work fine when you first load the page, but after going from an article back to the home page and then scrolling down, Admiral gets triggered.

https://streamable.com/r2qo72

issue.title: ottawasun.com

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body: I can also reproduce it on Chrome and Edge.

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body: They’re unlikely to fix it since it only happens when using AdGuard. It occurs when both Admiral domains are blocked. Firefox only blocks `succeedscene.com`, so it falls back to `inventorycache.com` and everything works fine. but AdGuard blocks `inventorycache.com`, resulting in both Admiral domains being blocked and triggering the error message.

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

@mu-hun 

> I’m on holiday until May 5. I will check it tomorrow. 👀

I'm very sorry for the inconvenience!

> the mobile Google login drawer.

I can't either reproduce it on mobile.

> We are not blocking the login wall. Because it is intended to remain visible and should not be hidden.

It's very annoying if you prefer to use ChatGPT without an account. If you want to sign in/up, you can well hit the respective buttons in header.
